Aug 21, 2025

Aug 18, 2025

* Bringing clarity and alignment across teams.  
* Preventing wasted engineering effort on shiny but misaligned solutions.  
* Anchoring direction in both *first principles* and *measured facts*.  
* Framing decisions at the system level (“simplify architecture, scale HMS horizontally”) rather than in narrow fixes.

[https://slack-pde.slack.com/archives/CJFHE7AR3/p1755526995219119](https://slack-pde.slack.com/archives/CJFHE7AR3/p1755526995219119)
